<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Palynziq is indicated for the treatment of patients with phenylketonuria (PKU) aged 16 years and older who have inadequate blood phenylalanine control (blood phenylalanine levels greater than 600...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>diabetic retinopathy（99.2%）</li>
<li>severe nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy（99.2%）</li>
<li>diabetic cataract（99.1%）</li>
<li>nuclear senile cataract（99.0%）</li>
<li>cortical cataract（99.0%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus type 2 associated cataract（99.0%）</li>
<li>craniostenosis cataract（99.0%）</li>
<li>tetanic cataract（99.0%）</li>
<li>mature cataract（99.0%）</li>
<li>immature cataract（99.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
